sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_MAIN_THERMAL_PAD, part number PSV-000100, submitted by (주)휴켐 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier part approval package documenting product identification, revision history, raw material list, material properties section, QC manufacturing process flow, and product inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_MAIN_THERMAL_PAD and model/part number is PSV-000100.
Applicable models listed are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP.
Revision history lists Rev. 0 dated 4/23/25 with initial establishment.
Raw material list includes Siloxanes and Silicones, Di-Me, Vinyl group terminated; Aluminium oxide; and Platinum Compound.
QC manufacturing process includes raw material incoming, pigment manufacturing, slurry manufacturing, defoaming, molding, cutting, packaging, and inspection.
